title: Ancient sea ice salt may have helped lock Earth into global deep freeze
description: A new modeling study suggests that salt left behind on sea ice could have made the planet even brighter and colder as global glaciation began.

title: Scientists find 4,000-year-old plague in ancient sheep

title: The affordable road trip that is Europe’s best-kept secret with seaside towns and ancient cities
description: WHILE prices for the most popular Mediterranean resorts keep ­rising, you can get the same ­turquoise seas, mountain drives and warm hospitality in Albania – for a fraction of the cost. Visit in the shoulder season and you’ll enjoy golden light and near-empty beaches at an unhurried pace. Flying in to capital Tirana makes a...
